title.en: England held to goalless draw by Ghana

summary.en: England fail to repeat their performance that overpowered Croatia in their first World Cup game as they are held to a draw by a resolute Ghana at Boston Stadium.

title.en: 'Anxious moment for England' - should this have been Ghana penalty?

summary.en: England's Ezri Konsa makes a last-ditch attempt to stop Ghana's Prince Adu during their World Cup Group L match in Boston.

title.en: Tuchel credits 'committed' Ghana defending after England draw

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel says England found it "difficult" to break down Ghana's defence, after the two teams played out a 0-0 draw at the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Portugal thrash Uzbekistan as Ronaldo scores twice to make history

summary.en: Cristiano Ronaldo becomes the first player to score in six World Cups as his double helps Portugal thrash Uzbekistan.

title.en: 'VAR went for a coffee' - should Ghana have had penalty against England?

summary.en: England fans have been left frustrated by the goalless draw against Ghana, but were Thomas Tuchel's side fortunate not to have given away a penalty?

title.en: Mendes scores 'brilliant' second goal for Portugal

summary.en: Nuno Mendes and Cristiano Ronaldo trick the entire stadium to score a second goal for Portugal against Uzbekistan in their Group K match in the 2026 World Cup.

title.en: Rice remains positive after England draw with Ghana

summary.en: England midfielder Declan Rice says he remains positive despite being held to a 0-0 draw against Ghana in their World Cup Group L match in Boston.

title.en: The trial that saved Antoine Semenyo's career

summary.en: BBC Sport traces the origin story of Manchester City and Ghana star Antoine Semenyo, and hears from former coach David Hockaday about the trial which saved his career.

title.en: Norway win five-goal thriller against Senegal to make last 32

summary.en: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway book their place in the last 32 of the World Cup with a 3-2 victory over Senegal in New Jersey.

title.en: France weather storm to beat Iraq and sail into knockouts

summary.en: Kylian Mbappe marks his 100th international cap for France with two goals in a 3-0 win over Iraq which seals' Les Bleus place in the last 32, after a two-hour storm delay.

title.en: Algeria complete late turnaround to send Jordan home

summary.en: Algeria fight back to eliminate debutants Jordan from the World Cup and keep their own knockout hopes alive in San Francisco.

title.en: Spence appears not to shake hands with Partey

summary.en: Footage circulating on social media appears to show England's Djed Spence not shaking hands with Ghana's Thomas Partey before their World Cup group match in Boston.

title.en: 'I'm back' - record-breaking Ronaldo answers critics

summary.en: Portugal forward Cristiano Ronaldo provides the perfect response to those that doubted him as he becomes the first player to score at six World Cups.

title.en: Deschamps returns to France after death of his mother

summary.en: France head coach Didier Deschamps will miss his side's final World Cup group game following the death of his mother, the French Football Federation confirms.
